creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #2)

Hmm, now that I think about it some more: If it uses a devel/llvm* instead
of system clang for its toolchain, my build might have used devel/llvm17
to do the build (different default). (But that would not change which libc++
was involved in case that matters.)
